tweets.text:
14" MacBook Pro is seriously the best form factor. 

And now that it has the exact same specs as the 16", it's a total no brainer.
Love seeing OSS maintainers getting their Claude Max emails. We’re just getting started y’all!

The amount of DM's and personal outreach I've received over the weekend showing support and love has been overwhelming. Thank you all. 🧡

The Claude community is seriously the best. If you're new, welcome, if you've been with us for some time, keep thinking!

Broke up with ChatGPT but want to keep the memories? We gotchu!

Claude can import what matters to you so you don't feel like you're starting over. And I think you'll like it more here 😉 https://t.co/aY7SKT3uWt
RT @_catwu: /remote-control is now available to all Pro users!

28 Days of Claude API - Day 28 - The Agent SDK

The raw API gives you Claude. The Agent SDK gives you Claude with hands.

File access. Bash. Web search. Subagents. Sessions. MCP. All built in. You define the task and the boundaries and Claude handles the rest.

The difference between API and Agent SDK:

Raw API → precise control over every tool call, every turn, custom orchestration. 

Agent SDK → you set the task and the boundaries, Claude handles execution. 

Pick based on how much you want to drive.
